evidence: "I enjoyed this movie very much. It was a thriller that kept you guessing up until the end."
"I love this series as it follows the book so closely."
"The story was a little hard to follow, and very dark."
"It had a lot of flashbacks and I sometimes got lost in these transitions."
"The plot was predictable, and the acting good with a fair and just ending."
"I enjoyed the various plots and the scenery of a part of the world that I will probably not get to visit."
"Everything about this production was wonderful -- the actors, the storyline, the filming -- I can't say enough good things about this series."
"The acting and story were great, and I would like to see it evolve into a series."
"I love this series as it follows the book so closely."
"I really enjoyed this series and hope that there will be a Season 2."
"The actors are good in their roles!"
"I really enjoyed this series and was sad to learn that it had ended."
"Great acting, but a very sad story."
"It was a sad story where you didn't really know what had happened until the end."

summary: The user enjoys drama and thriller genres, appreciating high production quality and emotional depth in storytelling. They have mixed feelings about narrative complexity and pacing, indicating a preference for engaging plots that may sometimes be hard to follow.
